title: Satan Pack
description: Actually minecraft 2.0 with nothing new added. Some QoL changes. Graphics and FPS improvements.
body:
Satan Pack

Version: 1.20.1

Description:

The Satan Pack is a meticulously crafted modpack designed for Minecraft version 1.20.1 using the Fabric mod loader. It focuses on enhancing the gameplay experience without introducing new blocks, items, or mobs.

Features:

  • Quality of Life Changes: The Satan Pack incorporates numerous quality of life improvements to streamline your gameplay and make your Minecraft adventures even more enjoyable.
  • Shader Support: Experience the stunning visuals of Minecraft with shader support, which adds breathtaking lighting and visual effects to the game.
  • New World Generation: Explore a refreshed and diverse world with the modpack's custom world generation, providing unique landscapes and exciting terrain.
  • Custom Nether and End Dimensions: Delve into the depths of the Nether and journey to the End with custom dimensions that offer new challenges and rewards.
  • RPG-like Skills System: Engage in a dynamic progression system inspired by RPG games, where you can develop and level up various skills, enhancing your abilities and unlocking new possibilities.
  • Good Optimization: The Satan Pack is optimized to ensure smooth performance and minimal lag, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the game.
  • Useful Mods: In addition to the above features, the modpack includes a variety of other useful mods such as "Diggus Maximus" and "EMI" that complement your gameplay experience with additional functionalities.
